# POLYROB Configuration Reference (compact)

Distilled from `docs/CONFIGURATION.md` for the `polyrob-user-guide` skill.
Regenerate with `python scripts/gen_user_guide_refs.py`; see the full doc
for code anchors and complete prose.

## LLM / providers

- LLM_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS — default: 16384 — Hard cap on generated output tokens per call.
- LLM_PROMPT_CACHE / ANTHROPIC_PROMPT_CACHE — default: ON — Global prompt-caching kill-switch (either set falsey disables; default ON).
- GEMINI_PROMPT_CACHE — default: OFF — Opt-in Gemini explicit `cachedContents` (billed, TTL'd object).
- GEMINI_CACHE_TTL_MIN — default: 10 — TTL (minutes) for the Gemini explicit cache object.
- OPENROUTER_PROMPT_CACHE — default: OFF — Adds Anthropic-style `cache_control` breakpoints on the OpenRouter tools block.
- THINKING_CONFIG_ENABLED — default: OFF — Enables per-provider extended-thinking/reasoning-effort config (real behavior change).
- THINK_SCRUBBER_ENABLED — default: ON ("1") — Strips leaked `<think>`/`<reasoning>` blocks at the content→AIMessage seam.
- LLM_TOKEN_STREAMING — default: OFF — 019 P5: TRUE per-token streaming.
- STREAM_BRAIN_SCRUB — default: ON ("true") — Scrubs brain-state JSON from the streamed user-facing buffer.
- TASK_MAX_INPUT_TOKENS — default: unset — Caps input-token budget for the task agent (shared-client clobber guard).
- COMPACTION_MODEL — default: unset — Explicit aux model for context compaction.
- COMPACTION_AUX_MODEL — default: '' — Legacy alias / aux compaction model string.
- COMPACTION_PROVIDER — default: unset — Provider override for the compaction aux model.
- COMPACTION_AUTO_AUX — default: OFF — Auto-route compaction to the provider cheap-map model.
- AUX_MODEL_JUDGE — default: unset — Explicit aux model for the output-validation judge task.
- AUX_AUTO — default: OFF — Globally enable per-task aux-model auto-routing (union with `COMPACTION_AUTO_AUX`).
- AUX_PROVIDER — default: unset — Provider for aux-model resolution.
- AUX_MODEL_COMPACTION / AUX_MODEL_JUDGE / AUX_MODEL_REFLECTION — default: unset — B5: per-slot primary aux model, takes precedence over the legacy `COMPACTION_MODEL`/`AUX_MODEL_JUDGE` envs (note `AUX_M…
- AUX_PROVIDER_COMPACTION / AUX_PROVIDER_JUDGE / AUX_PROVIDER_REFLECTION — default: unset — B5: per-slot primary provider override, takes precedence over legacy `COMPACTION_PROVIDER`/`AUX_PROVIDER`.
- AUX_FALLBACK_COMPACTION / AUX_FALLBACK_JUDGE / AUX_FALLBACK_REFLECTION — default: unset — B5: comma-separated ordered fallback candidates for the slot, each `provider/model` (or a bare `model`, which auto-dete…
- REFLECTION_LLM_ENABLED — default: **ON** — H-MEM phase consolidation via aux LLM instead of string concat.
- NATIVE_TOOLS_DEBUG — default: '' (off) — Verbose native-tool-call debug logging.
- DEFAULT_PROVIDER — default: unset — Operator-pinned default provider for new CLI/chat sessions (precedence 2 — below an explicit `-p`/API arg, above the `~…
- DEFAULT_MODEL — default: unset — Operator-pinned default model, paired with `DEFAULT_PROVIDER`/`CHAT_PROVIDER`. `CHAT_MODEL` wins over this when both ar…
- CHAT_PROVIDER — default: unset — Highest-precedence operator pin for the default provider; wins over `DEFAULT_PROVIDER`.
- CHAT_MODEL — default: unset — Highest-precedence operator pin for the default model; wins over `DEFAULT_MODEL`.

## Memory

- MEMORY_BACKEND — default: **sqlite** (**local_vector under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Cross-session memory provider: `sqlite` (FTS5), `local_vector` (hybrid kw+vec), `none/off/''` disables.
- KB_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Tenant knowledge base: `@folder`/`@url` ingestion + KB recall via `session_search`.
- KB_AUTO_PREFETCH — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Inject KB recall alongside memory recall at step start (T13).
- CONTEXT_REFERENCES_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — `@file`/`@folder`/`@url` context references in chat input.
- MEMORY_REQUIRE_USER_ID — default: **ON** (True) — Refuse empty/anonymous-user recall I/O (multi-tenant safety).
- MEMORY_VECTOR_MAX_DISTANCE — default: 0.6 — Max vector distance for `local_vector` recall hits.
- MEMORY_TOOL_ENABLED — default: OFF — Opt-in bounded `memory` notes tool (read/add/remove + C1 create/update/archive/list/show; writes threat-scanned fail-cl…
- MEMORY_TOOL_MAX_ENTRIES — default: 50 — Per-tenant entry cap for the `memory` tool (active+pending notes; archived notes free space).
- MEMORY_TOOL_MAX_CHARS — default: 2000 — Per-tenant char cap for the `memory` tool.
- MEMORY_ROW_MAX_CHARS — default: 4000 — Max chars per auto-injected cross-session `memories` row (D8; truncated at write, shared by the FTS and vector halves s…
- MEMORY_RETENTION_DAYS — default: 365 — Age-based retention for cross-session `memories` rows (B3): rows with a provenance stamp older than this are pruned on…
- KNOWLEDGE_CURATOR_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — C4 mechanical note consolidation on the curator tick: archive never-read agent-authored notes + collapse exact duplicat…
- KNOWLEDGE_NOTE_STALE_DAYS — default: 90 — Days an agent-authored note can stay unread before the knowledge curator archives it.
- MEMORY_PREFETCH_CADENCE — default: 0 (**3 under POLYROB_LOCAL and for autonomous sessions**) — `0` = prefetch on first step only; `N>0` = also every N steps (inert without external provider).
- HMEM_SEMANTIC — default: auto — H-MEM cross-phase recall mode: `auto` (embeddings if an embedder exists, else lexical) / `embeddings` / `lexical` / `of…
- HMEM_TAIL_PLACEMENT — default: ON — Place in-session H-MEM as a dynamic suffix AFTER the conversation instead of in the foundation prefix, so the stable fo…
- MEMORY_THREAT_SCAN — default: OFF — Prompt-injection scan rejecting injected findings before H-MEM write.
- MEMORY_SEARCH_TOOL — default: **ON** — Read-only cross-session `memory_search`/`session_search` tool (tenant-scoped).
- MEMORY_STORE_ANSWER_ONLY — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Store the distilled ANSWER (not the echoed "User: {q}\nAssistant: {a}" transcript) as the FTS-matched/embedded recall c…
- MESSAGE_STORE_BACKEND — default: '' (off) — `sqlite` = additive write-only durable mirror of JSON message history (JSON stays SSOT).
- TRAJECTORY_CAPTURE — default: OFF — Opt-in run-end trajectory capture: each finished goal/cron/`polyrob run` session is assembled into a canonical training…
- MAX_MEMORY_CACHE_SIZE — default: 30 — In-memory history cache size.
- MEMORY_CLEANUP_INTERVAL — default: 50 — Clean memory every N operations.

## Skills

- SKILL_PROGRESSIVE_DISCLOSURE — default: **ON** — Inject only a compact `<skill-catalog>`; full body pulled via `load_skill`.
- TOOL_PROGRESSIVE_DISCLOSURE — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Dynamic tool rig (S1-S4): pin an honest `<tool-catalog>` foundation block (every known tool: `loaded` / `loadable` / `g…
- SKILL_CATALOG_INCLUDE_ALL — default: **ON everywhere** — Include all (auto-activatable) skills in the `<skill-catalog>` regardless of trigger match, so a paraphrased task can s…
- SKILLS_WRITABLE — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Agent can create/patch/delete/promote skills (`skill_manage`).
- SKILLS_WRITABLE_REQUIRE_REVIEW — default: ON (True) — Main-agent skill writes go to `.pending/` review unless promoted.
- SKILL_OVERWRITE_PROTECT — default: **ON** — An agent/background overwrite of an existing ACTIVE skill becomes a `.pending/` proposal (owner promotes) instead of cl…
- POLYROB_TRUST_PROJECT_SKILLS — default: **local-mode default: ON**; server: **forced OFF, no env override** — Gate for project-scope skill discovery (`./.agents/skills/`, `./.claude/skills/`, walked CWD->git-root).

## Autonomy & continuous-learning loops

- AUTONOMY_MODE — default: supervised — Capability/approval master. `autonomous` = single-owner act-and-report instance (capability flags below default ON, ful…
- TOOL_AVAILABILITY_HINT — default: **ON** — 013 T8 (owner transparency directive): injects a `<tool-availability>` system-prompt block disclosing every known-but-n…
- AUTONOMY_POSTURE — default: silent — `silent` = today's defaults (autonomy runs but is unverified + owner-silent). `owner-visible` = the agent's autonomous…
- AGENT_COMPUTE_POSTURE — default: 0 — `0` = confined (today's docker sandbox, no persistent shell). `1` = sandbox-dev: persistent networked sandbox with **im…
- SELF_WAKE_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — W1: re-enter an idle session as a forged continuation turn.
- SELF_WAKE_MAX_REENTRIES — default: 3 — Per-session self-wake depth cap.
- SELF_WAKE_IDLE_BACKOFF_SEC — default: 30 — Idle backoff before a self-wake re-entry.
- BACKGROUND_REVIEW_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — W2: fork a cheap aux reviewer every N productive turns.
- BG_REVIEW_INTERVAL — default: 10 — Productive-turn interval between background reviews.
- BG_REVIEW_MAX_STEPS — default: 8 — Max steps for a background-review fork.
- CRON_RUN_LOOP — default: **ON** — W3 fix: cron jobs actually run `run_session` (not just create an idle session).
- CRON_DELIVERY_ENABLED — default: OFF — Deliver cron results out-of-band (telegram/email/twitter).
- OWNER_DIGEST_ENABLED — default: OFF — Owner daily digest: a cron job carrying `payload.digest` is composed deterministically ($0, no model turn) from the uni…
- CRON_DELIVERY_ALLOW_EXPLICIT_TARGET — default: OFF — Allow an explicit (non-tenant-default) delivery target.
- SEND_MESSAGE_USER_DELIVERY — default: **ON** — §3.1 communication contract: the agent's `send_message` in an AUTONOMOUS session (goal/cron/planner) routes to the sess…
- USER_DELIVERY_DEDUP_HOURS — default: 24 — §3.2 rail memory: identical content (per tenant, content-hash) delivered again within this window is suppressed (`dedup…
- USER_DELIVERY_RATE_PER_HOUR — default: 10 — §3.2 rail memory: max user-bound sends per tenant per rolling hour (agent sends + cron delivery + framework notices sha…
- USER_DELIVERY_DAILY_CAP — default: 30 — §3.2 rail memory: max user-bound sends per tenant per rolling 24h.
- TELEMETRY_EVENT_LOG_PATH — default: unset — Override the durable telemetry event log's db path (default: `<data_root>/telemetry_events.db`).
- RUN_EVENTS_ENABLED — default: **ON** — 019 live run-state observability: master gate for the span/wait feed events (`tool_started` / `llm_started` / `awaiting…
- TELEGRAM_PROGRESS_EDITS — default: **ON** — 019 P2: the Telegram `⚙️ Working…` bubble becomes a live status line (throttled in-place edits ≤1/2.5s: current tool /…
- AUTONOMY_START_NOTICE — default: OFF (**ON under AUTONOMY_POSTURE=full/autonomous**) — 019 P2: one-line owner notice when an autonomous goal/cron run STARTS (`▶ goal started: …`) via the one delivery rail (…
- TICKER_IDLE_BACKOFF_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Cron + goal-dispatch background tickers back off their poll interval on idle ticks (nothing due) instead of firing at a…
- TICKER_IDLE_BACKOFF_MAX_MULTIPLIER — default: 5 — Cap on how many multiples of a ticker's base interval idle backoff may reach (e.g. 5x a 60s base = 300s worst-case stal…
- GOALS_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — W4: durable cross-session goal board + dispatcher.
- GOAL_MAX_RETRIES — default: 2 — Goal circuit-breaker failure threshold.
- GOAL_CLAIM_TTL_SEC — default: 900 — Goal claim lease TTL.
- GOAL_MAX_RUN_SECONDS — default: 1800 — Hard wall-clock cap on a single goal run (mirrors cron); a timeout is recorded as a failure and the slot is reclaimed.
- GOAL_DISPATCH_INTERVAL_SEC — default: 60 — Goal dispatcher tick interval.
- GOAL_MAX_CONCURRENT — default: 2 — Max concurrent goal runs.
- GOAL_PLANNER_ENABLED — default: OFF — Goal-planner feature gate.
- GOAL_PLANNER_MIN_READY — default: 2 — Min ready goals before planner triggers.
- GOAL_PLANNER_COOLDOWN_SEC — default: 3600 — Planner cooldown (seconds).
- GOAL_PLANNER_HISTORY_N — default: 10 — Planner goal history window.
- GOAL_DAILY_QUOTA — default: 6 — Max goal runs started per trailing 24h; <=0 disables.
- GOAL_SELF_WAKE_ENABLED — default: OFF — Goal-initiated self-wake re-entry — gates whether the dispatcher *attempts* delivery (`agents/task/goals/dispatcher.py:…
- GOAL_NOTIFY_ON_DONE — default: ON — §3.4 SAFETY NET (demoted from unconditional push): tell the user when a background goal completes **only when the agent…
- GOAL_DEDUP_THRESHOLD — default: 0.6 — Goal dedup similarity threshold (0.0–1.0).
- AUTONOMY_HALT — default: OFF — Owner kill-switch: halt ALL autonomous agent invocation — goal dispatch AND (since G-35) cron ticks, checked FIRST in e…
- CURATOR_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — W5: stale/archive unused authored skills (Phase 1, no LLM).
- CURATOR_INTERVAL_HOURS — default: 168 — Curator tick interval (hours).
- CURATOR_STALE_DAYS — default: 30 — Days unused before a skill is staled.
- CURATOR_ARCHIVE_DAYS — default: 90 — Days before stale skill is archived.
- INSIGHTS_TOOL — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — W7: read-only authored-skill reuse-% `insights` action.
- AGENT_STATUS_TOOL — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — I-6: read-only `agent_status` introspection action — steps used/remaining, active tools, context-token usage, wallet +…
- VERIFY_BEFORE_DONE — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — I-3 / H3 (dedup decision D1): when the run's action ledger shows a successful code edit (`str_replace`/`apply_patch`/`c…
- PROJECT_CONTEXT_AUTOLOAD — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — C9: auto-load a project file as a frozen `PROJECT_CONTEXT` foundation message.
- ENV_CONTEXT_BLOCK — default: ON — 014-C1: pin the `<environment>` foundation block (instance, platform, data dir, absolute workspace path + persistence s…
- PROJECT_CONTEXT_MAX_TOKENS — default: 20000 — Token cap on concatenated project-context content (truncated with a notice).
- PROJECT_CONTEXT_SERVER_MODE — default: OFF (NOT a safe-local flag) — Phase 2: load project context on the **server** (not local mode) and inject it **untrusted-wrapped** (framed as DATA, n…
- EPISODIC_MEMORY_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL or AUTONOMY_POSTURE owner-visible/full**) — Episodic activity ledger: write one durable, time-ordered row per completed run (chat/goal/cron) to the `episodes` tabl…
- EPISODIC_DIGEST_INJECT — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL or AUTONOMY_POSTURE owner-visible/full**) — Inject a passive session-start digest of recent episodes (chat sessions only, `exclude_surfaced=True`) as a pinned foun…
- CONTINUITY_BRIDGE_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Idle-reset continuity bridge: write a closing episode + seed the next session's first step with a short "what happened…
- AUTONOMOUS_CONTINUITY_BRIDGE — default: OFF — §7.5: carry a recent-activity summary INTO an **autonomous** goal/cron tick (mirror-image of the chat digest — autonomo…
- SELF_EVOLUTION_TRANSPARENCY — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — §7.1: proactively notify the owner (Telegram) when the agent writes a pending identity/skill proposal, and back the `po…
- GOAL_BLOCKER_ESCALATION — default: OFF — §7.2: when a goal trips the circuit breaker (`status='blocked'`) OR the planner leaves the pipeline empty repeatedly, s…
- GOAL_EMPTY_PIPELINE_ESCALATE_AFTER — default: 2 — Consecutive planner runs that leave the ready queue EMPTY before the stall is escalated to the owner (rides `GOAL_BLOCK…
- GOAL_COMPLETION_JUDGE — default: **ON** — §4.3 evidence-grounded completion review (autonomous runs): a cheap aux model (the `judge` aux slot) reads the agent's…
- GOAL_JUDGE_TIMEOUT_SEC — default: 60 — Wall-clock bound on one completion-judge LLM call; timeout fails open to pass.
- GOAL_BLOCKED_MAX_AGE_DAYS — default: 14 — §5.3 blocked-goal stewardship: `blocked` goals older than this (measured from when they blocked) age out VISIBLY to `ca…
- REFLECTION_ON_SESSION_CLOSE — default: OFF (**ON under AUTONOMY_POSTURE owner-visible/full**) — §7.7: consolidate a short session's findings at session close (the per-step 25-finding trigger is unreachable for short…
- AUTONOMY_STATE_DURABLE — default: ON — Restart-durable autonomy state (`autonomy_state.db`): background delegations write dispatched/terminal rows (a crash-in…
- REFLECTION_SESSION_CLOSE_THRESHOLD — default: 5 — Minimum findings a session must accrue for the `REFLECTION_ON_SESSION_CLOSE` trigger to fire (cost gate).
- CONTINUITY_LLM_SUMMARY — default: OFF (everywhere; NOT a safe-local flag) — Use an aux-model LLM call to summarize the closing episode for the continuity bridge instead of a mechanical summary.
- EPISODIC_RETENTION_DAYS — default: 90 — Episodic row retention window (days).

## Delegation / sub-agents

- SUB_AGENTS_ENABLED — default: **ON** ('true'; BotConfig field also True) — Enable `delegate_task` / sub-agent delegation.
- SUBAGENT_LEAST_PRIVILEGE — default: ON ('true') — Give a delegated child a narrowed dedicated controller/toolset.
- DELEGATE_BLOCKED_TOOLS — default: {code_execution, coding, cronjob, git, github, hf_deploy, hyperliquid, mcp, polymarket, process, self_env, shell, tool_manage, x402_invoice, x402_pay} — Container tool_ids dropped from a delegated child.
- MAX_SUB_AGENT_DEPTH — default: 1 — Delegation depth backstop.
- MAX_CONCURRENT_SUB_AGENTS — default: 3 — Max concurrent sub-agents.
- MAX_ASYNC_SUB_AGENTS — default: 2 (clamped ≤ concurrent) — Background/async delegation slots.
- SUB_AGENT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS / SUB_AGENT_TIMEOUT — default: 600 — Single sub-agent (`goal`) timeout.
- PARALLEL_SUBTASKS_TIMEOUT_SECONDS / PARALLEL_SUBTASKS_TIMEOUT — default: 900 — Parallel-subtasks timeout.

## Tools / code-exec / cron / approvals

- MCP_ENABLED — default: OFF (False) (ON under AUTONOMY_MODE=autonomous) — Enable the MCP subsystem globally.
- MAX_MCP_PER_STEP — default: 3 — Max MCP tool calls per step.
- MCP_EXEC_RATE_PER_WINDOW — default: 20 — MCP exec rate-limit count per window.
- MCP_EXEC_RATE_WINDOW_SEC — default: 60 — MCP exec rate-limit window (s).
- MCP_ENCRYPTION_KEY — default: unset — Fernet key for MCP secret store.
- MCP_SELF_INSTALL_ENABLED — default: OFF (False) — Register the agent-callable `mcp_install` action (install a vetted catalog MCP server at runtime).
- MCP_INSTALL_CATALOG_FILE — default: unset — Path to a REVIEWED JSON file of extra installable catalog entries (`{"<id>": {description, transport, url/command, trus…
- MCP_INSTALL_ALLOWLIST — default: unset — Comma list of extra ids admitted to the install allowlist.
- ANYSITE_TOOL_ENABLED — default: ON (True) — Register the `anysite_api` CLI tool.
- ANYSITE_API_KEY — default: unset — AnySite API credential.
- CODING_TOOLS_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Register the coding tools (str_replace/grep/run_tests).
- CODING_LSP_ENABLED — default: OFF (not safe-local) — I-2 / H1 (dedup decision D2): after a successful `str_replace`/`apply_patch`/`create_file`, run an external checker (`p…
- CODING_SNAPSHOT_ENABLED — default: OFF (not safe-local) — I-4 / H2 (dedup decision D3): shadow-git PER-FILE snapshot/restore.
- GIT_TOOLS_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Register the `git` tool (status/diff/log/branch/checkout/add/commit/pull/push/clone) over the confined workspace.
- GITHUB_TOOL_ENABLED — default: OFF (not safe-local) — Register the `github` tool (PRs/issues/actions; auth via `GITHUB_TOKEN`/`GH_TOKEN`).
- CODE_EXEC_ENABLED — default: OFF — Register `code_execution` tool (NOT a sandbox; never in default tool_ids).
- CODE_EXEC_BACKEND — default: local_subprocess — Code-exec backend selector.
- CODE_EXEC_MAX_TIMEOUT_SEC — default: 30 — Hard cap on a code-exec run.
- CODE_EXEC_MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES — default: 100000 — Code-exec output byte cap.
- CODE_EXEC_DOCKER_IMAGE — default: python:3.12-slim — Container image for the `docker` code-exec backend (explicit value wins over `CODE_EXEC_DEV_IMAGE` in every mode).
- CODE_EXEC_DEV_IMAGE — default: nikolaik/python-nodejs:python3.11-nodejs20 — Image for the posture≥1 persistent DEV container when `CODE_EXEC_DOCKER_IMAGE` is unset — python+node so npm/npx toolch…
- CODE_EXEC_NETWORK — default: none — Docker container network policy: `none` / `egress` (→ docker `bridge`) / `host`; unrecognized values fall back to `none…
- CODE_EXEC_CONTAINER_MEMORY_MB — default: 1024 — Docker container memory cap (MB); also sets `--memory-swap` equal (no swap headroom).
- CODE_EXEC_CONTAINER_CPUS — default: 1.0 — Docker container CPU cap (`--cpus`).
- CODE_EXEC_PIDS_LIMIT — default: 256 — Docker container PID cap (`--pids-limit`).
- CODE_EXEC_DOCKER_USER — default: unset → invoking uid:gid, or 65534:65534 (nobody:nogroup) when the host process itself runs as root — Explicit override for the docker backend's `--user`.
- CODE_EXEC_DOCKER_PERSISTENT — default: OFF (**ON at AGENT_COMPUTE_POSTURE>=1**) — Opt-in: ONE persistent per-session `docker` container (`docker exec` per call) instead of a fresh ephemeral container p…
- CODE_EXEC_PUBLISH_PORTS — default: 8000,5000,8080,3000 — Container ports a **dev** (posture≥1) persistent sandbox publishes to host **loopback** (`-p 127.0.0.1::<port>`, docker…
- SHELL_TOOLS_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON at AGENT_COMPUTE_POSTURE>=1**) — Register the persistent `shell` + `process` tools (run inside the session's sandbox container; cwd/env persist; backgro…
- SELF_ENV_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON at AGENT_COMPUTE_POSTURE>=2**) — Register the `self_env` self-maintenance tool (install_dep/read_source/patch_source/git_pull/restart_service).
- POLYROB_INSTALL_TREE — default: repo root (2 levels up from tools/self_env/tool.py) — The install-tree root `self_env` read/patch/git_pull operate under (realpath-confined).
- POLYROB_SUPERVISED — default: OFF — Assert a supervisor (e.g. systemd `Restart=`) will respawn the process, so `self_env_restart_service` may request a res…
- HF_DEPLOY_ENABLED — default: OFF (not safe-local) — Register the `hf_deploy` tool (deploy/undeploy/list_deployments — publish the session workspace as a Hugging Face Space…
- HF_DEPLOY_ORG — default: unset — The Hugging Face org/user namespace to publish Spaces under (`<HF_DEPLOY_ORG>/<app_name>`).
- HF_DEPLOY_DAILY_MAX — default: 10 — Max deploy attempts per tenant per rolling 24h.
- HF_DEPLOY_MIN_INTERVAL_SEC — default: 120 — Minimum seconds between deploy attempts of the SAME app.
- HF_TOKEN — default: unset (secret) — Hugging Face fine-grained write token used ONLY by the `hf_deploy` broker (`HfApi`) to create/update Spaces and set sec…
- DEPLOYED_APPS_DB_PATH — default: unset (derived from data root) — Override path for the `hf_deploy` registry DB (`deployed_apps.db`); the test suite redirects this to keep unit runs off…
- CRON_ENABLED — default: OFF — Register the `cronjob` tool + start the cron ticker.
- WAKE_CHANGE_GATE — default: OFF (**ON under AUTONOMY_POSTURE=full**) — Cron wake change-gate: a job with `payload.change_gated` skips the paid model call ($0 tick, `cron_run skipped/no_chang…
- MESSAGE_TOOL_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Agent-callable `message(surface, target, text, action)` send tool.
- MESSAGE_AUTONOMOUS_ALLOWLISTED — default: OFF (ON under AUTONOMY_MODE=autonomous) — Whether a forged/AUTONOMOUS turn (goal/cron/planner session, sub-agent, self-wake re-entry) may use `message` at all.
- DELIVERABLES_ATTACH_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Goal/cron completion pushes attach the run's file deliverables (screened + capped) to the OWNER chat via the delivery r…
- DELIVERABLES_ATTACH_MAX_MB — default: 10 — Per-file attach cap in MB for the completion AUTO-attach (Telegram bot API hard limit is 50).
- DELIVERABLES_ATTACH_MAX_FILES — default: 3 — Max files attached to one completion message; the remainder is listed by name+size+path.
- MESSAGE_MEDIA_MAX_MB — default: 45 — Per-file cap for the explicit `message` tool `media_paths` send (owner-directed; Telegram hard limit ~50 MB).
- WEBVIEW_PUBLIC_URL — default: unset — Public base URL of the owner-auth webview console (e.g. `https://console.example.com`).
- APPROVAL_REQUIRED_TOOLS — default: '' (no-op) — Comma list of tools requiring approval before execution.
- APPROVAL_PROVIDER — default: auto — Approval provider: `auto`(allow)/`auto_notify`(allow + `tool_auto_approved` audit event + post-hoc owner notification —…
- APPROVAL_TIMEOUT_SEC — default: 30 — Approval-request timeout (cancels provider on expiry).
- PAYMENT_APPROVAL_MODE — default: approve (auto under AUTONOMY_MODE=autonomous) — Task 9 / G-2 — the owner-legible switch for outward payment-creation actions (`PAYMENT_APPROVAL_TOOLS`), gated FIRST-CL…
- APPROVAL_GRANT_TTL_HOURS — default: 24 — TTL for an `owner_queue` ONE-SHOT grant: an owner decision recorded AFTER the requester already timed out still lets th…
- POLYROB_TOOL_DENYLIST — default: '' — Comma list of tools vetoed by the pre-tool-call guardrail (fail-closed).
- POLYROB_AGENT_TOOLSET — default: unset — Named toolset driving the CLI session's tool list (`resolve_toolset`), same as `polyrob run --toolset <name>`.
- TOOL_SCHEMA_ERROR_POLICY — default: DROP_TOOL — Invalid native schema handling: `DROP_TOOL`/`RAISE`/`WARN`.
- TOOL_SCHEMA_SANITIZE — default: ON ('true') — Fix hostile JSON-Schema constructs in the emitted tools list.
- UNTRUSTED_TOOL_RESULT_WRAP — default: **ON** — Frame untrusted tool-result strings in `<untrusted_tool_result>` delimiters.
- ENABLE_GIF_CREATION — default: OFF — (Legacy/dead) GIF creation.
- FS_REALPATH_CONFINE — default: ON ("on") — Confine filesystem ops via realpath.
- BROWSER_ALLOW_PRIVATE_URLS — default: OFF ('false') — Allow browser navigation to private/loopback URLs.

## API / server / sessions

- OPENAI_COMPAT_API_ENABLED — default: OFF — Mount the OpenAI-compatible `/v1` router.
- SESSION_REGISTRY_BACKEND — default: memory — Active session→orchestrator map backend: `memory` (in-proc) or `sqlite` (cross-proc metadata).
- API_HOST — default: 127.0.0.1 — API bind host.
- API_PORT — default: 9000 — API bind port.
- API_AUTH_TOKEN — default: unset — API auth token.
- API_RATE_LIMIT_RPM — default: 60 — API requests/minute.
- API_RATE_LIMIT_RPH — default: 1000 — API requests/hour.
- API_RATE_LIMIT_BURST — default: 10 — API burst allowance.
- CORS_ALLOW_ORIGINS — default: **Two independent consumers, two different defaults** — see note below — Comma-separated allowed CORS origins.
- WEBVIEW_DOMAIN — default: the reference deployment's public host (webview/server.py, api/auth_endpoints.py); localhost:5050 (agents/task/utils_webview.py) — **inconsistent default across call sites; set WEBVIEW_DOMAIN for your own deployment** — The public hostname this instance is served from.
- JWT_SECRET_KEY — default: unset (dev) — JWT signing secret, shared by the API auth middlewares and the WebView (`webview/owner_auth.py` issues/verifies the own…
- A2A_BASE_URL — default: the reference deployment's base URL (set this to your own public URL) — Base URL advertised in the A2A agent card.
- WEBVIEW_ACTIVITY_ENABLED — default: true — The console's global `/activity` stream (page + `/api/activity/*` + `join_activity` socket room).
- WEBVIEW_ACTIVITY_TAIL_SEC — default: 2.0 — Poll interval for the activity hub's SQLite id-cursor tails (`telemetry_events.db`, `goal_events`, `skill_install_audit…
- WEBVIEW_READ_ONLY — default: false — Monitoring-only console: mutating endpoints (session messages POST, `/api/repair/{id}`, preferences PATCH, pending prom…
- POLYROB_API_BASE — default: http://127.0.0.1:9000 — Base URL of the main task API the webview proxies to (chat delivery, queue-status, health) in the classic two-service s…
- SESSION_TTL_SECONDS — default: 86400 — Session lifetime.
- MAX_SESSIONS_IN_MEMORY — default: 100 — Resident session cap.
- MAX_SESSIONS_PER_USER — default: 10 — Per-user session cap.
- CREATED_SESSION_TTL_SECONDS — default: 3600 — TTL for a created-but-not-yet-run session.
- SESSION_RESET_MODE — default: idle (#7) — Chat session-boundary policy: `idle`/`daily`/`both`/`none`.
- SESSION_IDLE_MINUTES — default: 1440 (**720 POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Idle threshold; a chat idle longer than this starts a fresh session (when `SESSION_RESET_MODE` includes idle).
- SESSION_RESET_HOUR — default: 4 — Local hour (0-23) for the daily session roll (when mode includes daily).
- SURFACE_GC_ENABLED — default: ON when local **+** chat bus on, else OFF — Periodic GC (hourly via the autonomy runtime) of stale chat<->session bindings; horizon `max(2× idle window, 7d)`.
- UVICORN_HOST — default: 127.0.0.1 — Uvicorn bind host (read in `main.py`).
- UVICORN_PORT — default: 9000 — Uvicorn bind port (read in `main.py`).
- UVICORN_WORKERS — default: 1 — Uvicorn worker count (read in `main.py`).
- UVICORN_RELOAD — default: OFF (false) — Uvicorn auto-reload (read in `main.py`).
- ENVIRONMENT / ENV — default: development (varies by site) — Environment selector.
- LOG_LEVEL — default: INFO — Logging level.
- CHAT_TOOL_IDS — default: task — Tools loaded for the chat surface.
- CHAT_MAX_STEPS — default: 8 — Max agent steps for a chat-surface turn.
- CHAT_SKIP_CREDIT_CHECK — default: ON (truthy) — Skip the credit check on chat-path turns.

## Identity / polyrob / local profile

- POLYROB_LOCAL — default: OFF — Single-user terminal profile; flips the `_SAFE_LOCAL_FLAGS` group ON as a default.
- POLYROB_DATA_DIR — default: unset — Isolation switch (doc 01/06): when set — the headless/server case — the runtime data home (goals.db/cron.db/memory.db +…
- POLYROB_PROJECT_DIR — default: unset — When set, the agent uses this folder as ONE persistent workspace shared across sessions/goals/cron (Claude-Code style),…
- POLYROB_LOG_DIR — default: unset — Runtime log directory override.
- POLYROB_PROJECT_SECRET_REFUSE — default: 0 — When truthy, refuse to start if the cwd-default persistent workspace contains secrets/`.git` (SEC-1).
- POLYROB_REQUIRE_PAIRING — default: OFF — Owner-allowlist + DM-pairing ingress gate; when ON, an unpaired sender is denied at the surface dispatcher.
- TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN — default: unset — Telegram bot token (from @BotFather) for the `polyrob telegram` local-polling surface.
- ALLOWED_TELEGRAM_USER_IDS — default: unset — Comma list of raw Telegram numeric user ids allowed to drive the bot.
- POLYROB_OWNER_TELEGRAM_ID — default: unset — The owner's raw Telegram numeric id, used for two things: (1) the **inbound owner alias** — an inbound from this id is…
- POLYROB_OWNER_EMAIL / BOT_OWNER_EMAIL — default: unset — The owner's email address for **out-of-band cron delivery** (`deliver="email"`) on single-owner headless deploys where…
- SINGULAR_CHAT_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON for polyrob telegram**) — Installs the outbound surface bus so agent replies route to a chat surface.
- TELEGRAM_SURFACE_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON for polyrob telegram**) — Telegram surface enable flag.
- DISCORD_SURFACE_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON for polyrob discord**) — Discord surface enable flag (Gateway WS bot; DMs + allowlisted guild channels).
- SLACK_SURFACE_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON for polyrob slack**) — Slack surface enable flag (Socket Mode — no public URL).
- SIGNAL_SURFACE_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON for polyrob signal**) — Signal surface enable flag (local `signal-cli daemon --http`).
- X_SURFACE_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON for polyrob x**) — X (Twitter) DM surface enable flag.
- X_DM_POLL_SEC — default: 90 — Seconds between `dm_events` polls.
- GROUP_CHAT_ENABLED — default: OFF (ON under AUTONOMY_MODE=autonomous) — W3 group/channel ingress.
- GROUP_REQUIRE_MENTION — default: ON — In group chats, act only when the bot is @mentioned (surfaces set `InboundMessage.mentions_bot`; unknown counts as NOT…
- TELEGRAM_INCREMENTAL_STREAM — default: OFF — Live `editMessageText` streaming (#8): a turn's deltas open+edit one message (stable per-turn `stream_id`); the discret…
- TELEGRAM_STREAM_EDIT_INTERVAL_SEC — default: 1.5 — Min seconds between live stream edits (flood-control); `0` edits on every delta.
- VOICE_TRANSCRIPTION_ENABLED — default: OFF — Transcribe inbound voice/audio to text before routing (#9), so a voice note is handled like a typed message.
- VOICE_TRANSCRIPT_ECHO — default: ON — Echo the transcript back into the chat as a persistent, voice-note-anchored message (`🎙️ Transcript: "…"`) before the a…
- VOICE_TRANSCRIPTION_MODEL — default: base — faster-whisper model size (`tiny`/`base`/`small`/`medium`/`large-v3`).
- CORRESPONDENT_ACCESS_ENABLED — default: OFF (ON under AUTONOMY_MODE=autonomous) — WS-A three-tier access model — the **single switch** for the whole feature (no sub-flags).
- CORRESPONDENT_REQUIRE_APPROVAL — default: ON (True) (OFF under AUTONOMY_MODE=autonomous) — A newly auto-seeded correspondent is PENDING (owner must `polyrob owner approve`) before replies route.
- CORRESPONDENT_MAX_NEW_PER_DAY — default: 20 — Per-tenant cap on new correspondents seeded per 24h (bounds injected mass-contact).
- OUTBOUND_POLICY — default: allowlist (open under AUTONOMY_MODE=autonomous) — 013 T5 — pure outbound-policy model (`open|domains|allowlist|off` ladder). `resolve_outbound_policy` merges env-or-mode…
- OUTBOUND_DOMAINS — default: unset (empty) — Comma-separated domain allowlist consulted when `OUTBOUND_POLICY=domains` (email-shaped targets only; other surfaces fa…
- OUTBOUND_DAILY_SEND_CAP — default: 30 — Control-plane cap on outbound sends/day once policy is `open`/`domains` (mirrors the `USER_DELIVERY_DAILY_CAP` conventi…
- CORRESPONDENT_TTL_DAYS — default: 0 (never) — Days of inactivity before a correspondent binding is marked expired (stops resolving). `0` = never — expiry silently br…
- CORRESPONDENT_RESOLVE_LATEST — default: ON (True) — When ONE tenant has several active bindings for one address (multiple sessions contacted the same person) and a reply c…
- CONVERSATION_RESUME_ENABLED — default: ON (True) — When a correspondent replies to a conversation whose originating session is dead (missing/unrecreatable), create a repl…
- CORRESPONDENT_REPLY_ENABLED — default: OFF (ON under AUTONOMY_MODE=autonomous) — D1 scoped reply-while-tainted: permit `message`/`send_email` to EXACTLY the tainting (surface, address) — 1:1 only (mul…
- CORRESPONDENT_REPLY_MAX_ROUNDS — default: 5 — Outbound messages per correspondent per 24h allowed under the scoped tainted-reply exemption (counted from the Conversa…
- MAX_EPHEMERAL_MESSAGES — default: 30 — Cap on the one-shot ephemeral injection queue (correspondent replies / recall notes); overflow drops the OLDEST with a…
- EMAIL_SURFACE_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON for polyrob email**) (ON under AUTONOMY_MODE=autonomous) — Email surface (IMAP poll inbound + SMTP outbound). v1 is correspondent-only; owner-by-email stays OFF.
- EMAIL_IMAP_POLL_SEC — default: 60 — Seconds between IMAP polls for new mail (no IDLE in v1).
- EMAIL_AUTONOMY_RUNTIME — default: OFF — Proposal 010 A: whether `polyrob email` starts the shared autonomy runtime (goal dispatcher + cron ticker + curator + s…
- GMAIL_EMAIL / GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD — default: unset — Mail credentials for the `email` tool (SMTP send + IMAP read) — the email surface reuses the same tool/creds.
- GMAIL_IMAP_SERVER / GMAIL_SMTP_SERVER / GMAIL_SMTP_PORT — default: imap.gmail.com / smtp.gmail.com / 587 — IMAP/SMTP server endpoints for the email tool; point these at any provider.
- WHATSAPP_SURFACE_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON for polyrob whatsapp**) — WhatsApp Cloud API webhook surface enable flag.
- WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN — default: unset — Meta permanent/system-user access token used by the Cloud API sender client.
- WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID — default: unset — Meta Phone Number ID of the sending number.
- WHATSAPP_VERIFY_TOKEN — default: unset — Token echoed back on the GET webhook verify handshake (Meta webhook setup).
- WHATSAPP_WEBHOOK_SECRET — default: unset — HMAC-SHA256 payload-signature secret (Meta app secret). **Unset ⇒ inbound webhook payloads are rejected** (fail-closed).
- WHATSAPP_TEMPLATE_NAME — default: task_ready — Approved utility template used to re-open the 24h messaging window for a proactive (agent-initiated) message.
- SELF_CONTEXT_WRITABLE — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Agent can write its evolving SELF identity doc.
- SELF_CONTEXT_REQUIRE_REVIEW — default: ON (True) — SELF-context writes go to `.pending/` review.
- OWNER_DOC_WRITABLE — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Agent can maintain a bounded owner-facts doc (`owner.md`, ≤1600 chars) injected on the SELF/SOUL seam — durable facts/p…
- OWNER_DOC_REQUIRE_REVIEW — default: ON (True) — Owner-facts writes go to `.pending/` review (owner promotes via `/pending` or `polyrob owner`).
- DATA_ROOT — default: ./data/task — Server-bootstrap (`build_bot`/`main.py`) data root for sessions/dbs.
- DB_PATH — default: unset (derived: <data_dir>/database/bot.db) — Explicit `bot.db` location (R-2 B2 made it REAL — historically a decoy the app never opened).
- POLYROB_CLI_CONFIG — default: unset — CLI config path override (default `~/.polyrob/cli.json`).
- POLYROB_GITIGNORE_DOTROB — default: ON ("1") — Auto-gitignore the `.polyrob/` home.
- CLI_WORKSPACE_LOCK — default: ON ("1") — CLI workspace lock to prevent concurrent CWD corruption.
- CLI_PREFER_ACTION_TEXT — default: ON ('true') — CLI prefers clean action text over raw streamed buffer.
- POLYROB_INSTANCE_ID / BOT_INSTANCE_ID — default: "rob" (DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID) — Instance identity id; `POLYROB_INSTANCE_ID` is canonical, `BOT_INSTANCE_ID` an accepted alias.
- POLYROB_OWNER_USER_ID / BOT_OWNER_USER_ID — default: unset → **instance id** — Explicit binding of this instance's OWNER principal (an **internal `user_id`** — **not** a raw Telegram id).
- POLYROB_LOCAL_OWNER — default: unset — Fallback owner id for `webgate.local_owner_id()`, ranked BETWEEN an explicitly-bound owner and the instance-id default…
- SURFACE_SUPER_ADMIN_USER_IDS — default: unset — Comma list of **internal `user_id`s**. **Only its FIRST entry has any effect** — it is precedence (2) for the OWNER pri…
- SURFACE_ADMIN_USER_IDS — default: unset — **Inert — grants nothing.** Its only consumer was the dead `SurfacePermissions` role ladder (removed 2026-07-03).

## Preferences (owner UX)

- PREFS_ENABLED — default: ON — Master switch for the whole preferences layer; when OFF, `resolve_with_source` always returns the env/default value and…
- PREFS_TOOL_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Agent-callable `preferences(operation, key?, value?, text?)` action — `list`/`get` read the typed schema (effective val…
- CONTRACT_DOC_ENABLED — default: ON — Injects the owner-authored operating-contract doc (`contract.md`, written via `ContractWriter`/the `preferences(contrac…
- CONTRACT_DOC_REQUIRE_REVIEW — default: ON — Whether a `contract_propose` write lands as a pending proposal (owner reviews/promotes with `/pending` + `/approve`) ra…

## Billing / x402 / wallet

- BILLING_FAILOVER_ENABLED — default: **ON** — Attempt provider fallback on a billing/quota/402 error before permanent halt.
- CREDIT_SENTINEL_ENABLED — default: **ON** — §6.3 provider-credit sentinel: a credit-death refusal (402/insufficient_quota/billing) from an autonomous goal/cron run…
- CREDIT_SENTINEL_RELEASE_HOURS — default: 6 — Auto-release window for the credit sentinel — after this many hours the latch expires and one paid probe may run (re-tr…
- LLM_OUTAGE_NOTICE — default: **ON** — Proposal 015 #2: when an owner-facing chat-surface turn dies with ALL LLM providers exhausted (e.g. the 2026-07-16 Open…
- X402_ENABLED — default: OFF ('false') — Enable x402 pay-per-request *receiving*.
- X402_CLIENT_ENABLED — default: OFF ('false') — Enable the agent-side x402 *paying* tool.
- X402_PAYMENT_RECIPIENT — default: '' — Treasury/recipient address for x402 receipts.
- X402_INVOICE_ENABLED — default: OFF (ON under AUTONOMY_MODE=autonomous) — Agent money loop: registers the `x402_invoice` tool (`x402_request` create-invoice + `x402_invoices` list + `accounting…
- X402_INVOICE_MAX_USD — default: 50 — Hard ceiling on a single agent-created payment request (an absurd invoice is a reputation incident).
- X402_INVOICE_DAILY_MAX — default: 10 — Max invoices one tenant may create per trailing 24h.
- X402_PUBLIC_RATE_PER_WINDOW — default: 20 — G-20: per-IP call budget for the PUBLIC (anon-allowed, enumerable `inv_<12hex>` id) invoice endpoints — `GET /api/x402/…
- X402_PUBLIC_RATE_WINDOW_SEC — default: 60 — Window (seconds) for `X402_PUBLIC_RATE_PER_WINDOW`.
- X402_TRUSTED_PROXIES — default: '' (loopback 127.0.0.1/::1 always trusted) — ⚠️ **Security fix (G-20 regression, reproduced live):** the public invoice rate limiter above was keyed on `get_client_…
- USAGE_INVOICE_BRIDGE_ENABLED — default: OFF — Task 13 (Phase 3 R3), the metering→invoice bridge: registers the read-only `usage_summary` agent action (tenant-scoped…
- USAGE_INVOICE_MARKUP — default: 1.0 — Multiplier applied to a rollup's `api_cost_usd` when `build_invoice_draft` proposes a `suggested_invoice` amount (`1.0`…
- INVOICE_CARD_ENABLED — default: OFF (**ON under POLYROB_LOCAL**) — Task 6 (Phase 1): after a successful `x402_request`, also render a branded PNG invoice card (Mindprint avatar, amount,…
- INVOICE_QR_STYLE — default: address — What the invoice card's QR code encodes (via `modules/x402/artifact.py::build_payment_artifact`): `address` — the bare…
- X402_SETTLEMENT_WATCH_INTERVAL_SEC — default: 60 — Settlement-watcher tick interval (expire stale invoices; wake the originating session via self-wake when one settles; e…
- X402_SETTLE_ONCHAIN_DETECT — default: OFF — Task 11 (Phase 2), the "de-Coinbase" move: the settlement watcher ADDITIONALLY scans the treasury address for plain USD…
- X402_INVOICE_AMOUNT_JITTER — default: **ON** — Amount-collision jitter for on-chain matching: when a colliding equal-amount PENDING invoice already exists for the sam…
- X402_SETTLEMENT_SCAN_MAX_SPAN — default: 5000 — Max blocks one settlement-watcher tick will scan for on-chain detection, even after a long gap (bounds a single `eth_ge…
- X402_SETTLEMENT_CONFIRMATIONS — default: 2 — Confirmations buffer for on-chain detection — blocks within this many of the chain head are never scanned yet (a just-m…
- SUBSCRIPTIONS_ENABLED — default: OFF — Task 14 (Phase 3 R5), the first revenue wedge: watchtower subscriptions — a prepaid-period + renewal-invoice model gati…
- WATCHTOWER_PRICE_USD — default: 10.00 — Default monthly price (USD) for a watchtower subscription — `create_subscription` falls back to this when no explicit `…
- SUBSCRIPTION_RENEWAL_LEAD_DAYS — default: 5 — Days before a subscription's `paid_through` the settlement watcher creates the next renewal invoice.
- SUBSCRIPTION_GRACE_DAYS — default: 3 — Days past `paid_through` a lapsed subscription keeps its cron job running (status `grace`, still chasing renewal) befor…
- X402_DEFAULT_CHAIN — default: base — Default chain for x402.
- X402_FACILITATOR_URL — default: '' — x402 facilitator endpoint.
- X402_PRICE_USD — default: _derived_ (unset ⇒ economics-based, ~$30) — Single-source x402 per-request price (C2 SSOT) — the middleware charge, `/api/x402/pricing`, the Agent Card, and the 40…
- X402_MAX_TOKENS_PER_REQUEST — default: 200000 — Token budget one x402 request prepays for. **SSOT for BOTH the derived price AND the runtime hard cap** — `LLMUsageTrac…
- X402_PRICE_MARKUP — default: 2.0 — Safety multiplier on the derived x402 price (margin over worst-case token cost).
- AGENT_WALLET_ENABLED — default: OFF — Enable the agent's native wallet.
- AGENT_WALLET_NETWORK — default: testnet — Wallet network (`testnet`/`mainnet`).
- AGENT_WALLET_BACKEND — default: local_eoa — Wallet key backend.
- AGENT_WALLET_MAX_PER_TX_USD — default: 1000 — Per-transaction USD ceiling (catastrophic-loss guard, NOT a budget).
- AGENT_WALLET_OPERATIONAL_VENUE — default: treasury — Venue key that same-chain spend paths (x402, generic payments) SIGN with, so the funded address (`AgentWallet.address`)…
- AGENT_WALLET_DERIVATION — default: unset (meta.json wins; absent = legacy) — Recovery-hatch override for the wallet's key-derivation scheme (`legacy` | `bip44`).
- WALLET_DAILY_CAP_USD — default: unset (disabled) — Rolling 24h spend cap; unset = per-tx ceiling only.
- CREDIT_VALUE_USD — default: 0.01 — USD value of one credit.
- WELCOME_BONUS — default: 100 — New-user credit grant.
- EIP8004_ENABLED — default: OFF ('false') — Enable EIP-8004 on-chain agent registration.
- EIP8004_PAYMENT_FEEDBACK — default: OFF — Task 15 (Phase 4), the ERC-8004 ⇄ x402 compose seam: on settlement of an invoice with an identifiable payer (`correspon…
- EIP8004_ONCHAIN_ENABLED — default: OFF ('false') — Trust-mode claim only — flips the publicly-served `/eip8004/registration.json` `trustMode` from `local` (honest off-cha…
- EIP8004_AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY — default: unset — **SECRET, mask in logs/exports** — Signing key for ERC-8004 EIP-712 feedback authorizations (`ReputationManager`).
- ETH_PRICE_USD_OVERRIDE — default: unset — Fixed ETH/USD price for the deposit monitor — bypasses the live CoinGecko fetch entirely.
- ETH_PRICE_USD_MAX — default: 50000 — Sanity upper bound on the ETH/USD price (override or live fetch); a price above this raises instead of crediting a wild…
- DEPOSIT_MONITOR_ENABLED — default: OFF — Enable the deposit-monitoring background loop (requires `SEPOLIA_RPC_URL`/`ETHEREUM_RPC_URL` too).
- TREASURY_SWEEPER_ENABLED — default: **OFF** — Master gate for `TreasurySweeper` — the SaaS-deposit-side component that signs and broadcasts real fund-moving transact…
- TREASURY_ADDRESS — default: unset — Gnosis Safe / treasury wallet address the sweeper moves swept funds to.
- SWEEP_INTERVAL — default: 3600 (1h) — Poll interval (seconds) between `TreasurySweeper` sweep passes, once enabled.
- ENABLE_AUTH — default: OFF — **The real billing gate.** `core/initialization.py::initialize_auth_services()` (called unconditionally from `core/bot.…
- PAYMENT_MASTER_SEED / MASTER_SEED — default: unset — Master seed for deterministic per-user deposit-address derivation.

## WebView / Console (deployment posture, owner login, branding)

- POLYROB_POSTURE — default: _derived_ (see below) — Explicit deployment posture override: `local` | `own_ops` | `multitenant` (case-insensitive). **Wins outright** over ev…
- WEBGATE_MULTITENANT — default: OFF — Back-compat boolean alias that maps onto `POLYROB_POSTURE=multitenant` when the explicit posture var is unset (step 1 o…
- WEBGATE_HOST / WEBVIEW_HOST — default: _posture-derived_ (127.0.0.1 for local, 0.0.0.0 for own_ops/multitenant) — Explicit bind-host override; also feeds posture derivation (step 2 above) when `POLYROB_POSTURE`/`WEBGATE_MULTITENANT`…
- WEBGATE_PORT / WEBVIEW_PORT — default: 5050 — Bind port. `WEBGATE_PORT` wins over `WEBVIEW_PORT` when both are set. (`server_launcher.py`'s own code-level default is…
- POLYROB_OWNER_USERNAME — default: unset — Owner login username for `own_ops`/`multitenant` posture (Posture 1/2 console access).
- POLYROB_OWNER_PASSWORD_HASH — default: unset — Argon2 hash of the owner password — **never plaintext**. `verify_owner_password` always runs a real argon2 verify (agai…
- POLYROB_CONSOLE_NAME — default: "POLYROB Console" — Opt-in override of the web console's product display name.
- POLYROB_SUPPORT_URL — default: https://t.me/tmachinrobot — Support link shown in the console footer/help.
- POLYROB_SUPPORT_HANDLE — default: @TMACHINROBOT — Support handle text shown alongside the support link.
- POLYROB_BRAND_URL — default: https://your-polyrob-host.example — Instance brand URL; also the base for the derived `terms_url`/`privacy_url` defaults below.
- POLYROB_ORG_URL — default: https://theselfrule.org — Parent-org URL shown in the console footer.
- POLYROB_TERMS_URL — default: {POLYROB_BRAND_URL}/terms — Terms-of-service link (was a dead `href="#"` placeholder; now renders a real link).
- POLYROB_PRIVACY_URL — default: {POLYROB_BRAND_URL}/privacy — Privacy-policy link (same fix as above).

## Misc / runtime knobs

- TWITTER_ENABLED — default: OFF ('false') (ON under AUTONOMY_MODE=autonomous) — Enable the Twitter/X write surface.
- TWITTER_REQUIRE_APPROVAL — default: ON ('true') — Require approval for Twitter writes.
- ALLOWED_REASONING_TURNS — default: 1 — Tool-free planning turns allowed before escalation.
- COMPACTION_COOLDOWN_STEPS — default: 3 — Steps between LLM-compaction firings (85–95% band).
- COMPACTION_KEEP_RECENT — default: 10 — Min recent messages kept verbatim.
- COMPACTION_TAIL_TOKEN_RATIO — default: 0.20 — Tail kept by token budget.
- COMPACTION_PER_MSG_CHARS — default: 3000 — Per-message head+tail budget into summarizer.
- COMPACTION_TOOL_RESULT_CHARS — default: 2000 — Tool-result budget into summarizer.
- COMPACTION_MAX_SUMMARY_TOKENS — default: 12000 — Summary budget ceiling.
- COMPACTION_MIN_SUMMARY_TOKENS — default: 2000 — Summary budget floor.
- COMPACTION_MIN_SAVINGS_PCT — default: 10.0 — Anti-thrash back-off threshold.
- COMPACTION_CHECKPOINT — default: ON ('true') — Dump pre-compaction trajectory.
- CONTEXT_OVERFLOW_THRESHOLD — default: 0.90 — Context-usage fraction triggering overflow handling.
- MAX_REPETITIONS — default: 2 (dev) / 3 (prod) — Loop-detection repeat threshold.
- UNCHANGED_STATE_THRESHOLD — default: 3 (dev) / 4 (prod) — Unchanged-state loop threshold.
- EMPTY_ACTION_FAST_ESCALATE — default: ON ('true') — Escalate fast on empty-action loops.
- MIN_STEPS_BEFORE_DONE — default: 3 — Minimum steps before `done()` is honored.
- STEP_TIMEOUT_SECONDS — default: 300 — Per-step timeout.
- STALL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS — default: 300 — Stall detection.
- LLM_BASE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS — default: 30 — Base LLM timeout (adjusted up by token count).
- LLM_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS — default: 120 — Standard LLM request timeout.
- LLM_STREAM_TIMEOUT_SECONDS — default: 300 — Streaming LLM timeout.
- MAX_CONSECUTIVE_FAILURES — default: 5 — Step-error halt threshold.
- MAX_PARSE_RETRIES — default: 3 — JSON-from-text parse retries (fallback path).
- TASK_MODE — default: BALANCED — Task agent mode preset.
- TASK_PERSONALITY_BLOCK — default: OFF ('false') — Inject a personality block into the task agent.
- ANONYMIZED_TELEMETRY — default: ON (True) — Enable anonymized telemetry.
- DESTRUCTIVE_ACTION_POLICY — default: none — HITL policy for destructive actions (`confirm_phrase`/`soft_wait`/`none`).
- HITL_MODE — default: chat — Human-in-the-loop mode (`chat`/`block`/`off`).
- VALIDATE_OUTPUT — default: OFF — Judge-backed validation of the agent's final answer before it's accepted (CO-F1/CO-F10, wired live in Task 16 via the l…
- INTERRUPT_REDIRECT — default: OFF — T16: Ctrl-C mid-turn prompts for a redirect instruction that becomes the next turn instead of silently aborting.
- POLYROB_ENV — default: development (falls back to ENVIRONMENT) — Deployment environment name; `production`/`prod` makes the MCP encryption layer require a real `MCP_ENCRYPTION_KEY` ins…
- POLYROB_ENV_KEY_BACKFILL — default: ON ("1") — Local-mode backfill of missing secret keys (API keys etc.) from `config/.env.*` into the process env.
- POLYROB_HOME — default: ~/.polyrob — Override for the polyrob home directory (CLI config, keys, home-migration target).
- POLYROB_IN_DOCKER — default: unset — Force the self-update detector to classify the install as Docker (normally auto-detected via `/.dockerenv`); updates th…
- POLYROB_NONINTERACTIVE — default: unset — Truthy ⇒ never prompt interactively (suppresses the inline API-key wizard; same effect as `CI=true`).
- POLYROB_PERSISTENT_INPUT — default: ON — REPL uses the long-lived bottom-anchored prompt_toolkit input; set `0`/`off` for the legacy ephemeral prompt.
- POLYROB_PERSONA — default: unset — Persona for the CLI agent's `<identity>`: a known template key renders that template's persona (and seeds its skills);…
- POLYROB_PLAIN — default: OFF — Force the plain (non-Rich) CLI renderer; mirrors `--plain` (the flag wins).
- POLYROB_WORKSPACE_LOCK_DIR — default: set by bootstrap — Directory for the CLI workspace lock (interactive-gate/CWD-corruption guard).

## POLYROB_LOCAL profile (`_SAFE_LOCAL_FLAGS` group)

- SELF_WAKE_ENABLED — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).
- SKILLS_WRITABLE — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).
- SELF_CONTEXT_WRITABLE — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).
- OWNER_DOC_WRITABLE — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).
- BACKGROUND_REVIEW_ENABLED — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).
- GOALS_ENABLED — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).
- CURATOR_ENABLED — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).
- INSIGHTS_TOOL — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).
- AGENT_STATUS_TOOL — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).
- VERIFY_BEFORE_DONE — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).
- CODING_TOOLS_ENABLED — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).
- EPISODIC_MEMORY_ENABLED — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).
- EPISODIC_DIGEST_INJECT — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).
- CONTINUITY_BRIDGE_ENABLED — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).
- SELF_EVOLUTION_TRANSPARENCY — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).
- PREFS_TOOL_ENABLED — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).
- INVOICE_CARD_ENABLED — default: (see doc) — See docs/CONFIGURATION.md (POLYROB_LOCAL profile group).

## Web fetch (Tier-1 lightweight web reader)

- WEB_FETCH_ALLOW_PRIVATE_URLS — default: OFF — When true, `web_fetch` skips SSRF validation (allows loopback/private/metadata targets).

## Crypto trading (Polymarket / Hyperliquid)

- CRYPTO_TRADE_LIVE_ENABLED — default: OFF — Master kill-switch for real order submission across both venues.
- POLYMARKET_TRADING_ENABLED — default: OFF — Per-venue live switch for Polymarket.
- HYPERLIQUID_TRADING_ENABLED — default: OFF — Per-venue live switch for Hyperliquid.
- POLYMARKET_TRADE_MAX_USD — default: 5 — Per-order live ceiling for Polymarket (ANDed with `TradingLimits` + PolicyGate).
- HYPERLIQUID_TRADE_MAX_USD — default: 5 — Per-order live ceiling for Hyperliquid.

## `polyrob update` — self-update & rollback

- POLYROB_UPDATE_REPO — default: derived from the dist Project-URL, else theselfruleorg/polyrob — GitHub `owner/name` the update-checker queries.
- POLYROB_UPDATE_PYPI — default: polyrob — PyPI project name for pip/pipx installs.

## Avatar (pfp)

- PFP_PUSH_TWITTER — default: OFF — Allow `polyrob pfp push --twitter` to set the X profile image (v1.1 `update_profile_image`, OAuth1 from `TWITTER_*` env…
- PFP_PUSH_TELEGRAM — default: OFF — Enable the Telegram assisted-push branch (prints BotFather `/setuserpic` steps — the Bot API cannot set a bot's own ava…
- PFP_PUSH_DISCORD — default: OFF — Allow `polyrob pfp push --discord` to set the Discord bot avatar (`PATCH /users/@me`, `DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN`; hash-idempot…
